# VER-QUIC-RFC9000-0014 - QUIC RFC 9000 Connection-ID Retransmission Reliability Verification

## Scope

This verification covers the supported send-runtime repair floor for packets carrying NEW_CONNECTION_ID and RETIRE_CONNECTION_ID payloads: loss of the tracked packet queues a retransmission plan containing the original packet bytes, and ACKs for unrelated packet numbers do not clear that repair work.

## Requirements Verified

- REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S13P3-0029
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S13P3-0030

## Verification Method

Requirement-home execution, reciprocal trace inspection, and SpecTrace render/check for the bounded connection-ID retransmission reliability proof.

## Preconditions

- The send runtime has already tracked a retransmittable application-data packet containing the connection-ID control-frame payload.
- The packet bytes are available on the sent-packet record.
- The caller owns packet protection, packet builder scheduling, and connection-ID lifecycle state outside this proof slice.

## Procedure or Approach

- Run the focused RFC 9000 requirement-home tests for S13P3-0029 and S13P3-0030.
- Render and check the touched SpecTrace artifacts.
- Confirm the focused artifact set is reciprocal only for the intended S13P3 connection-ID retransmission requirements.
- Confirm that no connection-ID lifecycle, migration routing, packet-builder scheduling, public API, or interop migration claim is introduced.

## Expected Result

Focused tests prove positive loss-to-repair behavior and negative unrelated-ACK retention for both connection-ID control-frame payloads. No new parser, serializer, or hot-path production behavior is introduced by this proof-link slice.

## Evidence

- src/Incursa.Quic/QuicConnectionSendRuntime.cs
- tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/RequirementHomes/RFC9000/REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S13P3-0029.cs
- tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/RequirementHomes/RFC9000/REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S13P3-0030.cs
- artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-cid-retransmission-reliability/focused-rfc9000-cid-retransmission-reliability-tests.log
- artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-cid-retransmission-reliability/render.log
- artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-cid-retransmission-reliability/render-check.log
- artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-cid-retransmission-reliability/reciprocal-trace-check.log
- artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-cid-retransmission-reliability/git-diff-check.log
- dotnet test tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests.csproj --no-restore -m:1 --filter "FullyQualifiedName~REQ_QUIC_RFC9000_S13P3_0029|FullyQualifiedName~REQ_QUIC_RFC9000_S13P3_0030"

## Status

Passed locally on 2026-04-25. Focused connection-ID retransmission requirement-home tests passed 4/4, and the focused reciprocal trace check linked only S13P3-0029 and S13P3-0030 to the new artifact set.

## No New Hot Path

This slice adds focused trace and evidence for existing send-runtime behavior. It does not alter parser, serializer, state-machine, or hot-path production code, so no new fuzz or benchmark surface is introduced here.
